records.m_Talk_ENG: It must be hard working so late.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It must be hard working so late.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It must be hard working so late.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sir? I thought you returned to your office after finishing your schedules.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sir? I thought you returned to your office after finishing your schedules.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir? I thought you returned to your office after finishing your schedules.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have to take out the gear to award the Gauntlet winner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have to take out the gear to award the Gauntlet winner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have to take out the gear to award the Gauntlet winner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Supreme Administrator will be visiting early tomorrow morning, so I have no choice but to prepare beforehand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Supreme Administrator will be visiting early tomorrow morning, so I have no choice but to prepare beforehand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Supreme Administrator will be visiting early tomorrow morning, so I have no choice but to prepare beforehand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because a Senior authority is required to take out gear from the armory...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because a Senior authority is required to take out gear from the armory...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because a Senior authority is required to take out gear from the armory...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You should go home.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You should go home.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You should go home.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We might be busy starting tomorrow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We might be busy starting tomorrow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We might be busy starting tomorrow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Class 2 Administrator confirmed. Richard Werner</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Class 2 Administrator confirmed. Richard Werner</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Class 2 Administrator confirmed. Richard Werner</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Access granted to the armory.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Access granted to the armory.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Access granted to the armory.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Richard Werner...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Richard Werner...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Richard Werner...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You were gravely injured after losing a battle during the Grand Purification War where you participated as a commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You were gravely injured after losing a battle during the Grand Purification War where you participated as a commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You were gravely injured after losing a battle during the Grand Purification War where you participated as a commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As time passed, you vowed you'd never forget the mistakes you made in the past when you were appointed as a Class 2 Administrator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As time passed, you vowed you'd never forget the mistakes you made in the past when you were appointed as a Class 2 Administrator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As time passed, you vowed you'd never forget the mistakes you made in the past when you were appointed as a Class 2 Administrator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you implanted the <color=#ffd34c>Senior Code</color>, the mark of a Class 2 Administrator, in your eye.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, you implanted the <color=#ffd34c>Senior Code</color>, the mark of a Class 2 Administrator, in your eye.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, you implanted the <color=#ffd34c>Senior Code</color>, the mark of a Class 2 Administrator, in your eye.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your vow to see those who died in the battle with the eye you lost in the war, and never forget about them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your vow to see those who died in the battle with the eye you lost in the war, and never forget about them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your vow to see those who died in the battle with the eye you lost in the war, and never forget about them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even your determination is rewritten with other information.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even your determination is rewritten with other information.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even your determination is rewritten with other information.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Data corruption is truly scary.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Data corruption is truly scary.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Data corruption is truly scary.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In your own way, you acted meticulously.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In your own way, you acted meticulously.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In your own way, you acted meticulously.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have worked with you for quite some time, but I could never imitate how you activate your code for you never showed me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have worked with you for quite some time, but I could never imitate how you activate your code for you never showed me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have worked with you for quite some time, but I could never imitate how you activate your code for you never showed me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But since I have now seen how it's activated...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But since I have now seen how it's activated...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But since I have now seen how it's activated...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This head is no longer needed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This head is no longer needed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This head is no longer needed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, this is the <color=#ffd34c>pseudo-Alternium Reactor</color> produced by Alphatrix.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, this is the <color=#ffd34c>pseudo-Alternium Reactor</color> produced by Alphatrix.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, this is the <color=#ffd34c>pseudo-Alternium Reactor</color> produced by Alphatrix.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And this is the Wolf's Tech Level 5 gear, <color=#ffd34c>Droma</color>...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And this is the Wolf's Tech Level 5 gear, <color=#ffd34c>Droma</color>...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And this is the Wolf's Tech Level 5 gear, <color=#ffd34c>Droma</color>...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Preparing the awards with equipment confiscated by Coffin Company.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Preparing the awards with equipment confiscated by Coffin Company.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Preparing the awards with equipment confiscated by Coffin Company.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So Richard and the Administrator already predicted who'd be the champion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So Richard and the Administrator already predicted who'd be the champion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So Richard and the Administrator already predicted who'd be the champion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An imitation of Chorus' wave amplifier, <color=#ffd34c>the converter</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: An imitation of Chorus' wave amplifier, <color=#ffd34c>the converter</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: An imitation of Chorus' wave amplifier, <color=#ffd34c>the converter</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The <color=#ffd34c>pseudo-Alternium Reactor</color> provides power to the converter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The <color=#ffd34c>pseudo-Alternium Reactor</color> provides power to the converter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The <color=#ffd34c>pseudo-Alternium Reactor</color> provides power to the converter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And the <color=#ffd34c>Wolf's blood</color> on Droma.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And the <color=#ffd34c>Wolf's blood</color> on Droma.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And the <color=#ffd34c>Wolf's blood</color> on Droma.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, with these three...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, with these three...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, with these three...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can lure <color=#ffd34c>the one</color> by creating a Qliphoth Factor wave. Just like how the Knights of Redemption did.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can lure <color=#ffd34c>the one</color> by creating a Qliphoth Factor wave. Just like how the Knights of Redemption did.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can lure <color=#ffd34c>the one</color> by creating a Qliphoth Factor wave. Just like how the Knights of Redemption did.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The <color=#ffd34c>false god</color> who lost all intelligence and was reduced to a monster...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The <color=#ffd34c>false god</color> who lost all intelligence and was reduced to a monster...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The <color=#ffd34c>false god</color> who lost all intelligence and was reduced to a monster...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're here. We've been waiting for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're here. We've been waiting for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're here. We've been waiting for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Senior's office is just inside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Senior's office is just inside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Senior's office is just inside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sir, your guest has arrived.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sir, your guest has arrived.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir, your guest has arrived.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Sir?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Sir?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Sir?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think he's in. Did he step out for a minute?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think he's in. Did he step out for a minute?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think he's in. Did he step out for a minute?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, of course not. If something came up, he would've told me first...
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, of course not. If something came up, he would've told me first...
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, of course not. If something came up, he would've told me first...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could you open the door for us, please?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could you open the door for us, please?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could you open the door for us, please?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The door seems to be locked.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The door seems to be locked.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The door seems to be locked.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on. I'll go get the keys.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on. I'll go get the keys.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on. I'll go get the keys.

records.m_Talk_ENG: S-sir...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-sir...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-sir...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where's... his head? W-what's happened to him...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where's... his head? W-what's happened to him...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where's... his head? W-what's happened to him...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Boss, this looks like...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Boss, this looks like...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Boss, this looks like...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mina, go call our employees.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mina, go call our employees.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mina, go call our employees.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It looks like we'll be busy soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It looks like we'll be busy soon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It looks like we'll be busy soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Identification completed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Identification completed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Identification completed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have a nice trip, Miss Swan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have a nice trip, Miss Swan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have a nice trip, Miss Swan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will. Thank you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will. Thank you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will. Thank you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you see that? She just smiled at me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you see that? She just smiled at me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you see that? She just smiled at me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's odd that such a well-known person is traveling alone without a manager.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's odd that such a well-known person is traveling alone without a manager.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's odd that such a well-known person is traveling alone without a manager.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She mentioned how she was going to take a break from acting after this one, right? Maybe she's going on vacation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She mentioned how she was going to take a break from acting after this one, right? Maybe she's going on vacation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She mentioned how she was going to take a break from acting after this one, right? Maybe she's going on vacation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't Lotus pretty dangerous to go on vacation, though? Even the residents there are trying their best to move away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't Lotus pretty dangerous to go on vacation, though? Even the residents there are trying their best to move away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't Lotus pretty dangerous to go on vacation, though? Even the residents there are trying their best to move away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's perfect for avoiding people. She must've struggled a lot with all the paparazzi constantly chasing her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's perfect for avoiding people. She must've struggled a lot with all the paparazzi constantly chasing her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's perfect for avoiding people. She must've struggled a lot with all the paparazzi constantly chasing her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're... really smitten, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're... really smitten, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're... really smitten, aren't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't think you'd pick up. This is unexpected.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't think you'd pick up. This is unexpected.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't think you'd pick up. This is unexpected.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, you were shameless enough to call, so I am being shameless and picking up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, you were shameless enough to call, so I am being shameless and picking up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, you were shameless enough to call, so I am being shameless and picking up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What did you want to talk about?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What did you want to talk about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What did you want to talk about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You really stirred things up before you left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You really stirred things up before you left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You really stirred things up before you left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I never expected you to take care of Charade's Senior in that manner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I never expected you to take care of Charade's Senior in that manner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I never expected you to take care of Charade's Senior in that manner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not a fan of people prying on me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not a fan of people prying on me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not a fan of people prying on me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Including that coy little retriever of yours.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Including that coy little retriever of yours.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Including that coy little retriever of yours.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're quite emotional. We must've upset you deeply.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're quite emotional. We must've upset you deeply.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're quite emotional. We must've upset you deeply.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everything is according to plan. My emotions have never strayed from the script.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everything is according to plan. My emotions have never strayed from the script.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everything is according to plan. My emotions have never strayed from the script.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But that answer is still not enough to help me understand this one thing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But that answer is still not enough to help me understand this one thing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But that answer is still not enough to help me understand this one thing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure you recognized the Supreme Administrator's identity that day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure you recognized the Supreme Administrator's identity that day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure you recognized the Supreme Administrator's identity that day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Going for the Administrator would've been easier than going through all that security to eliminate the Senior, am I wrong?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Going for the Administrator would've been easier than going through all that security to eliminate the Senior, am I wrong?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Going for the Administrator would've been easier than going through all that security to eliminate the Senior, am I wrong?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, you used to act like you knew everything... and now you're just another child, full of curiosity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, you used to act like you knew everything... and now you're just another child, full of curiosity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, you used to act like you knew everything... and now you're just another child, full of curiosity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't want to. Is that enough of a reason for you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't want to. Is that enough of a reason for you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't want to. Is that enough of a reason for you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You were looking for him so hard, and he's sure to be an obstacle in your play.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You were looking for him so hard, and he's sure to be an obstacle in your play.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You were looking for him so hard, and he's sure to be an obstacle in your play.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's fine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's fine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's fine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'd prefer him to survive and watch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'd prefer him to survive and watch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'd prefer him to survive and watch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Watch the things I'm about to accomplish.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Watch the things I'm about to accomplish.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Watch the things I'm about to accomplish.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'd like to ask a question now, Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'd like to ask a question now, Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'd like to ask a question now, Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Which one are we about to experience...? A thrilling chase? Or a mystery crime?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Which one are we about to experience...? A thrilling chase? Or a mystery crime?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Which one are we about to experience...? A thrilling chase? Or a mystery crime?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unfortunately, I won't be playing any role this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unfortunately, I won't be playing any role this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unfortunately, I won't be playing any role this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your mistake will come and haunt you at the most inconvenient moment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your mistake will come and haunt you at the most inconvenient moment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your mistake will come and haunt you at the most inconvenient moment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think he can get in my way? You know he can't do anything by himself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think he can get in my way? You know he can't do anything by himself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think he can get in my way? You know he can't do anything by himself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're a very talented actress, Swan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're a very talented actress, Swan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're a very talented actress, Swan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've never failed to give an amazing performance, no matter the circumstances.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've never failed to give an amazing performance, no matter the circumstances.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've never failed to give an amazing performance, no matter the circumstances.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But a masterpiece... isn't created by an actress alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But a masterpiece... isn't created by an actress alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But a masterpiece... isn't created by an actress alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then we shall see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then we shall see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then we shall see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If that great director you trust so dearly...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If that great director you trust so dearly...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If that great director you trust so dearly...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can steal the spotlight from an actress.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can steal the spotlight from an actress.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can steal the spotlight from an actress.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It must be hard working so late.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It must be hard working so late.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It must be hard working so late.

root.m_Talk_FRA: So Richard and the Administrator already predicted who'd be the champion.

root.m_Talk_ENG: An imitation of Chorus' wave amplifier, <color=#ffd34c>the converter</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: An imitation of Chorus' wave amplifier, <color=#ffd34c>the converter</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: An imitation of Chorus' wave amplifier, <color=#ffd34c>the converter</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The <color=#ffd34c>pseudo-Alternium Reactor</color> provides power to the converter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The <color=#ffd34c>pseudo-Alternium Reactor</color> provides power to the converter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The <color=#ffd34c>pseudo-Alternium Reactor</color> provides power to the converter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And the <color=#ffd34c>Wolf's blood</color> on Droma.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And the <color=#ffd34c>Wolf's blood</color> on Droma.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And the <color=#ffd34c>Wolf's blood</color> on Droma.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, with these three...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, with these three...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, with these three...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I can lure <color=#ffd34c>the one</color> by creating a Qliphoth Factor wave. Just like how the Knights of Redemption did.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I can lure <color=#ffd34c>the one</color> by creating a Qliphoth Factor wave. Just like how the Knights of Redemption did.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I can lure <color=#ffd34c>the one</color> by creating a Qliphoth Factor wave. Just like how the Knights of Redemption did.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The <color=#ffd34c>false god</color> who lost all intelligence and was reduced to a monster...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The <color=#ffd34c>false god</color> who lost all intelligence and was reduced to a monster...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The <color=#ffd34c>false god</color> who lost all intelligence and was reduced to a monster...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're here. We've been waiting for you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're here. We've been waiting for you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're here. We've been waiting for you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Senior's office is just inside.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Senior's office is just inside.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Senior's office is just inside.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sir, your guest has arrived.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sir, your guest has arrived.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sir, your guest has arrived.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Sir?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Sir?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Sir?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think he's in. Did he step out for a minute?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think he's in. Did he step out for a minute?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think he's in. Did he step out for a minute?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, of course not. If something came up, he would've told me first...
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, of course not. If something came up, he would've told me first...
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, of course not. If something came up, he would've told me first...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Could you open the door for us, please?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Could you open the door for us, please?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Could you open the door for us, please?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The door seems to be locked.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The door seems to be locked.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The door seems to be locked.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hold on. I'll go get the keys.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hold on. I'll go get the keys.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hold on. I'll go get the keys.

root.m_Talk_ENG: S-sir...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: S-sir...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: S-sir...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Where's... his head? W-what's happened to him...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Where's... his head? W-what's happened to him...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Where's... his head? W-what's happened to him...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Boss, this looks like...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Boss, this looks like...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Boss, this looks like...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mina, go call our employees.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mina, go call our employees.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mina, go call our employees.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It looks like we'll be busy soon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It looks like we'll be busy soon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It looks like we'll be busy soon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Identification completed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Identification completed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Identification completed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Have a nice trip, Miss Swan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Have a nice trip, Miss Swan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Have a nice trip, Miss Swan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I will. Thank you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I will. Thank you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I will. Thank you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you see that? She just smiled at me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you see that? She just smiled at me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you see that? She just smiled at me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's odd that such a well-known person is traveling alone without a manager.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's odd that such a well-known person is traveling alone without a manager.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's odd that such a well-known person is traveling alone without a manager.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She mentioned how she was going to take a break from acting after this one, right? Maybe she's going on vacation.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She mentioned how she was going to take a break from acting after this one, right? Maybe she's going on vacation.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She mentioned how she was going to take a break from acting after this one, right? Maybe she's going on vacation.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Isn't Lotus pretty dangerous to go on vacation, though? Even the residents there are trying their best to move away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Isn't Lotus pretty dangerous to go on vacation, though? Even the residents there are trying their best to move away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Isn't Lotus pretty dangerous to go on vacation, though? Even the residents there are trying their best to move away.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's perfect for avoiding people. She must've struggled a lot with all the paparazzi constantly chasing her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's perfect for avoiding people. She must've struggled a lot with all the paparazzi constantly chasing her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's perfect for avoiding people. She must've struggled a lot with all the paparazzi constantly chasing her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're... really smitten, aren't you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're... really smitten, aren't you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're... really smitten, aren't you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, Commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, Commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, Commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't think you'd pick up. This is unexpected.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't think you'd pick up. This is unexpected.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't think you'd pick up. This is unexpected.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, you were shameless enough to call, so I am being shameless and picking up.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, you were shameless enough to call, so I am being shameless and picking up.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, you were shameless enough to call, so I am being shameless and picking up.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What did you want to talk about?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What did you want to talk about?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What did you want to talk about?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You really stirred things up before you left.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You really stirred things up before you left.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You really stirred things up before you left.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I never expected you to take care of Charade's Senior in that manner.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I never expected you to take care of Charade's Senior in that manner.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I never expected you to take care of Charade's Senior in that manner.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not a fan of people prying on me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not a fan of people prying on me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not a fan of people prying on me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Including that coy little retriever of yours.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Including that coy little retriever of yours.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Including that coy little retriever of yours.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're quite emotional. We must've upset you deeply.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're quite emotional. We must've upset you deeply.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're quite emotional. We must've upset you deeply.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everything is according to plan. My emotions have never strayed from the script.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everything is according to plan. My emotions have never strayed from the script.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everything is according to plan. My emotions have never strayed from the script.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But that answer is still not enough to help me understand this one thing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But that answer is still not enough to help me understand this one thing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But that answer is still not enough to help me understand this one thing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure you recognized the Supreme Administrator's identity that day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure you recognized the Supreme Administrator's identity that day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure you recognized the Supreme Administrator's identity that day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Going for the Administrator would've been easier than going through all that security to eliminate the Senior, am I wrong?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Going for the Administrator would've been easier than going through all that security to eliminate the Senior, am I wrong?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Going for the Administrator would've been easier than going through all that security to eliminate the Senior, am I wrong?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fu fuu, you used to act like you knew everything... and now you're just another child, full of curiosity.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fu fuu, you used to act like you knew everything... and now you're just another child, full of curiosity.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fu fuu, you used to act like you knew everything... and now you're just another child, full of curiosity.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't want to. Is that enough of a reason for you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't want to. Is that enough of a reason for you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't want to. Is that enough of a reason for you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You were looking for him so hard, and he's sure to be an obstacle in your play.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You were looking for him so hard, and he's sure to be an obstacle in your play.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You were looking for him so hard, and he's sure to be an obstacle in your play.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's fine.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's fine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's fine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'd prefer him to survive and watch.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'd prefer him to survive and watch.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'd prefer him to survive and watch.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Watch the things I'm about to accomplish.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Watch the things I'm about to accomplish.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Watch the things I'm about to accomplish.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'd like to ask a question now, Commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'd like to ask a question now, Commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'd like to ask a question now, Commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Which one are we about to experience...? A thrilling chase? Or a mystery crime?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Which one are we about to experience...? A thrilling chase? Or a mystery crime?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Which one are we about to experience...? A thrilling chase? Or a mystery crime?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unfortunately, I won't be playing any role this time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unfortunately, I won't be playing any role this time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unfortunately, I won't be playing any role this time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your mistake will come and haunt you at the most inconvenient moment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your mistake will come and haunt you at the most inconvenient moment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your mistake will come and haunt you at the most inconvenient moment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think he can get in my way? You know he can't do anything by himself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think he can get in my way? You know he can't do anything by himself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think he can get in my way? You know he can't do anything by himself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're a very talented actress, Swan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're a very talented actress, Swan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're a very talented actress, Swan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You've never failed to give an amazing performance, no matter the circumstances.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You've never failed to give an amazing performance, no matter the circumstances.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You've never failed to give an amazing performance, no matter the circumstances.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But a masterpiece... isn't created by an actress alone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But a masterpiece... isn't created by an actress alone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But a masterpiece... isn't created by an actress alone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then we shall see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then we shall see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then we shall see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If that great director you trust so dearly...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If that great director you trust so dearly...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If that great director you trust so dearly...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can steal the spotlight from an actress.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can steal the spotlight from an actress.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can steal the spotlight from an actress.
